# Part I Index {.unnumbered}

Chapters in this part cover model setup, physical processes, and biological processes.

- @sec-introduction
- @sec-installation
- @sec-geometry-model-domain
- @sec-focing-files
- @sec-run-parameters
- @sec-functional-groups
- @sec-run-parameters
- @sec-force-parameters
- @sec-primary-producer-processes
- @sec-consumer-processes
- @sec-distribution-movement
- @sec-bacterial-inanimate
- @sec-environmental-factors
- @sec-ecology-overview
- @sec-part1-refs
- @sec-appendix-1
